title: IT1 Total reportable fringe benefits amounts 2024
description: Complete question IT1 to include any fringe benefits amounts you received from your employer.
keywords: Individual tax return instructions, income tests, reportable fringe benefits, 2024, tax return, IT1, paper form, paper return, paper lodgement

content_blocks.text: This question is about reportable fringe benefits amounts that you received. Do not show any benefit less than $3,773.
Did you receive any reportable fringe benefits amounts of $3,773 or more?

items: No – Write 0 (zero) at question IT1 – labels N and W , then go to question IT2 Reportable employer superannuation contributions 2024 .

content_blocks.text: The amount at question IT1 – label W , and the amount at question Spouse details – married or de facto – label S , won't be adjusted down when we calculate the following offsets:

items: the dependant (invalid and invalid carer) tax offset
the zone and overseas forces tax offset
the seniors and pensioners tax offset
the low income superannuation tax offset.

content_blocks.text: What you need to answer this question
You will need each income statement, PAYG payment summary – individual non-business and PAYG payment summary – foreign employment you received that shows reportable fringe benefits amounts .
To complete this question, follow steps 1 and 2 below.

If a reportable fringe benefits amount shown on your payment summary or income statement is less than $3,773, don't include it in step 1 or step 2. Check with your employer that the amount is correct.
Add up all the reportable fringe benefits amounts shown on your:

items: payment summaries with Yes selected at Is the employer exempt from FBT under section 57A of the FBTAA 1986 ?
income statements at Reportable fringe benefits – exempt amount .

content_blocks.text: Write the total at question IT1 – label N . If your total is zero, write 0 (zero) at label N .
Add up all the reportable fringe benefits amounts shown on your:

items: payment summaries with No selected at Is the employer exempt from FBT under section 57A of the FBTAA 1986 ?
income statements at Reportable fringe benefits – non-exempt amount .

content_blocks.text: Write the total at question IT1 – label W . If your total is zero, write 0 (zero) at label W .

items: Go to question IT2 Reportable employer superannuation contributions 2024 .
Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2024 .

content_text:
## Things you need to know
This question is about reportable fringe benefits amounts that you received. Do not show any benefit less than $3,773.
Did you receive any reportable fringe benefits amounts of $3,773 or more?
- No – Write 0 (zero) at question IT1 – labels N and W , then go to question IT2 Reportable employer superannuation contributions 2024 .
- Yes – Read on.
The amount at question IT1 – label W , and the amount at question Spouse details – married or de facto – label S , won't be adjusted down when we calculate the following offsets:
- the dependant (invalid and invalid carer) tax offset
- the zone and overseas forces tax offset
- the seniors and pensioners tax offset
- the low income superannuation tax offset.
## What you need to answer this question
You will need each income statement, PAYG payment summary – individual non-business and PAYG payment summary – foreign employment you received that shows reportable fringe benefits amounts .
## Completing your tax return
To complete this question, follow steps 1 and 2 below.
If a reportable fringe benefits amount shown on your payment summary or income statement is less than $3,773, don't include it in step 1 or step 2. Check with your employer that the amount is correct.
### Step 1
Add up all the reportable fringe benefits amounts shown on your:
- payment summaries with Yes selected at Is the employer exempt from FBT under section 57A of the FBTAA 1986 ?
- income statements at Reportable fringe benefits – exempt amount .
Write the total at question IT1 – label N . If your total is zero, write 0 (zero) at label N .
### Step 2
Add up all the reportable fringe benefits amounts shown on your:
- payment summaries with No selected at Is the employer exempt from FBT under section 57A of the FBTAA 1986 ?
- income statements at Reportable fringe benefits – non-exempt amount .
Write the total at question IT1 – label W . If your total is zero, write 0 (zero) at label W .
## Where to go next
- Go to question IT2 Reportable employer superannuation contributions 2024 .
- Return to main menu Individual tax return instructions 2024 .
- Go back to Income tests 2024 .
